mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_run (run_id, request_id, conversation_id, question, workspace, status, current_node, step, checkpoint_version) VALUES (#{runId}, #{requestId}, #{conversationId}, #{question}, #{workspace}, #{status}, #{currentNode}, #{step}, #{checkpointVersion}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE request_id = VALUES(request_id), conversation_id = VALUES(conversation_id), question = VALUES(question), workspace = VALUES(workspace), status = VALUES(status), current_node = VALUES(current_node), step = VALUES(step), checkpoint_version = VALUES(checkpoint_version), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_run WHERE run_id = #{runId} LIMIT 1
